sentence: 我们包车去机场，省得换来换去。
pinyin: Wǒmen bāo chē qù jīchǎng, shěngde huàn lái huàn qù.
english: We hired a car to go to the airport so we didn't have to keep transferring.

sentence: 实验室用电解水的方法制取氢气。
pinyin: Shíyànshì yòng diànjiě shuǐ de fāngfǎ zhì qǔ qīngqì.
english: The lab produces hydrogen by electrolyzing water.

meaning: an economy; a country (or region etc) viewed as an economic entity
sentence: 中国已经成为全球最大的经济体之一。
pinyin: Zhōngguó yǐjīng chéngwéi quánqiú zuì dà de jīng jì tǐ zhī yī.
english: China has become one of the world's largest economies.

sentence: 爷爷在山里耕作了一辈子。
pinyin: Yéye zài shān lǐ gēng zuò le yī bèizi.
english: Grandpa spent his whole life farming in the mountains.

sentence: 他用Excel制表，把数据整理得很清楚。
pinyin: Tā yòng Excel zhì biǎo, bǎ shùjù zhěnglǐ de hěn qīngchǔ.
english: He used Excel to make a table and organized the data very clearly.
